steps.title: Use Wong's explanation
steps.content: Wong says that while she seems to be doing nothing, a vibe, point, phrase, hook, title, image, connection, or epiphany can emerge. By calling this <u>composing</u>, she means invisible mental work that happens before words appear.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: Choice A invents self-deception. Choice C narrows the idea to gathering sources, though the passage focuses on internal creation. Choice D makes the activity passive soothing. The remaining choice describes this daydreaming as part of Wong's writing process. The answer is B.
